hero.headline: Your smile deserves the best care
hero.subheadline: Modern and personalised dental treatments for the whole family. First evaluation appointment available.

about.headline: Excellence in dental care since 2005
about.body: SorrisoPlus is a multidisciplinary dental clinic located in Carcavelos, dedicated to the oral health of the whole family. With a team of experienced specialists and state-of-the-art technology, we offer personalised treatments in a welcoming and reassuring environment.
about.mission_body: To provide excellent dental treatments, using the most modern technologies and techniques, in a comfortable and welcoming environment focused on patient well-being.

services.headline: Treatments for the whole family
services.subheadline: A complete clinic with all dental specialties
services.service_1_desc: Restorations, whitening, veneers and digital diagnostics for a perfect smile.
services.service_2_desc: Dental implants, All-on-4, All-on-6 and immediate loading with cutting-edge technology.
services.service_3_desc: Invisalign, fixed braces and interceptive orthodontics for children and adults.
services.service_4_desc: Wisdom tooth extraction, periodontal surgery and other surgical procedures.
services.service_5_desc: Treatment of gingivitis, periodontitis and periodontal maintenance.
services.service_6_desc: Specialist dental care for children, including conscious sedation.
services.service_7_desc: Root canal treatment and endodontic retreatment with mechanised instrumentation.
services.service_8_desc: Fixed, removable and implant-supported prosthetics to restore your smile.
services.service_9_desc: Scaling, polishing and personalised prevention plan.

team.headline: Specialists at your service
team.subheadline: A multidisciplinary team of dentists with advanced training

technology.headline: Modern treatments, precise results
technology.subheadline: State-of-the-art equipment for more accurate diagnoses and more comfortable treatments
technology.tech_1_desc: Cone beam computed tomography for precise implant planning and advanced diagnostics.
technology.tech_2_desc: Digital mouth scanning without traditional impressions, for more comfort and greater precision.
technology.tech_3_desc: Minimally invasive periodontal and surgical treatments with faster recovery.
technology.tech_4_desc: Digitally fabricated ceramic prostheses and restorations with maximum aesthetics and durability.
technology.tech_5_desc: Digital panoramic radiographs with minimal radiation dose.
technology.tech_6_desc: View the inside of your mouth in real time and participate in decisions about your treatment.

insurance.headline: We work with leading insurers
insurance.subheadline: We accept the main health subsystems and dental insurance to facilitate access to your treatments
insurance.note: Can't find your insurer? Contact us — we may have agreements with additional providers.

reviews.headline: What our patients say
reviews.subheadline: Over 8,500 satisfied patients in Carcavelos and surrounding areas
reviews.review_1_text: Excellent clinic! I had Invisalign treatment and was completely satisfied. The team is very professional and the environment is welcoming. Highly recommended.
reviews.review_2_text: I had two dental implants and the result was incredible. Dr. João explained everything in detail and I always felt in good hands. Post-op went very smoothly.
reviews.review_3_text: I've been bringing my children to SorrisoPlus for 5 years. Dr. Sofia has extraordinary patience with children and they love going to the dentist. Our family's go-to clinic.
reviews.review_4_text: I came in as an emergency with terrible toothache on a Friday afternoon and was seen immediately. Excellent service and fair prices. Definitely my new dentist.

faq.headline: Everything you need to know
faq.subheadline: Answers to the most common questions from our patients
faq.q1: How much does the first appointment cost?
faq.a1: The first evaluation appointment costs €30, which includes a full clinical examination, digital radiograph and personalised treatment plan. In many cases, this amount is reimbursable by your insurer.
faq.q2: Do you accept ADSE and other health subsystems?
faq.a2: Yes, we work with ADSE, Multicare (Fidelidade), AdvanceCare, Médis, Allianz, SAMS, PT-ACS and Medicare. Please see our agreements table for more details.
faq.q3: How long does Invisalign treatment take?
faq.a3: Invisalign treatment duration varies between 6 and 18 months, depending on the complexity of the case. At the evaluation appointment, the orthodontist will carry out an analysis and present a detailed plan with an estimated duration.
faq.a4: Implant placement is performed under local anaesthesia and is virtually painless during the procedure. Post-operative discomfort is generally managed with simple analgesics and lasts only a few days.
faq.q5: Does the clinic handle dental emergencies?
faq.a5: Yes, we reserve daily slots for emergency situations. In case of acute pain, dental trauma or infection, contact us by phone or WhatsApp and we will do our best to see you the same day.
faq.q6: What is conscious sedation with nitrous oxide?
faq.a6: Conscious sedation with nitrous oxide (laughing gas) is a safe and effective technique for reducing anxiety during dental treatments, especially in children. The patient remains conscious and cooperative, but in a state of deep relaxation.

contact.form_note: We respond within 24 hours. For emergencies, call directly.
